title: Canada’s immigration response to situations abroad - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada’s immigration response to situations abroad : Immigration, citizenship and passports
As part of the Government of Canada’s efforts to support those affected by conflicts, crises and other situations across the globe, this page provides detailed information on ongoing and past immigration policies and special measures. These initiatives go beyond our regular immigration programs to address the urgent needs of people facing extraordinary circumstances.
If you are impacted by a situation in Canada

## Current special measures for

## Recent special measures
- Earthquake in Morocco
- Earthquakes in Syria and Türkiye
- In-Canada families of Canadian victims of recent air disasters
